macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Meta Announces Efficiency-Focused Closed AI Model 'Muse Spark'
items.summary: Meta released 'Muse Spark', a new closed-source AI model emphasizing efficiency. This development highlights ongoing advancements in optimized AI architectures for broader applications.
items.source: テクノロジー / Meta AI Blog

items.title: Chinese Firm Z.ai Open-Sources GLM-5.1, Matching GPT-Level Performance
items.summary: Z.ai publicly released GLM-5.1 as open-source, claiming performance on par with leading GPT models. The move intensifies global competition in accessible high-performance AI.

items.title: Anthropic Launches Claude Managed Agents and CoWork Goes Public
items.summary: Anthropic announced 'Claude Managed Agents' for enterprise isolated environments, while Claude CoWork became generally available with enhanced management and governance features. These updates target secure, scalable AI deployment in businesses.

items.title: Genspark Releases AI Workspace 4.0 for On-PC AI Employees
items.summary: Genspark unveiled AI Workspace 4.0, enabling AI agents to operate directly on personal computers. This tool aims to integrate AI workers seamlessly into individual workflows.

items.title: Emerging Job Role: AI Agent Manager for Overseeing Multiple AIs
items.summary: A new profession, 'AI Agent Manager', is gaining traction to handle large-scale AI agent operations single-handedly. This reflects shifting industry trends toward AI orchestration roles.

items.title: CoreWeave CEO Highlights AI Infrastructure Bottlenecks: HBM, Power, and Supply Shortages
items.summary: CoreWeave's CEO detailed critical AI compute constraints including HBM memory shortages, power limitations, and supply chain delays projected to persist for years. Major firms like NVIDIA and Microsoft are securing long-term capacity amid surging demand.

items.title: OpenAI and Anthropic Respond to Growing AI Popularity Backlash
items.summary: Amid rising negative perceptions of AI, OpenAI proposes four-day workweeks and AI-funded public initiatives, while Anthropic pursues strategic partnerships with threatened sectors. Both aim to lead regulation discussions.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Pro Counter-Strike IGLs Build Perfect Rosters for CS2
items.summary: Top CS2 in-game leaders kyxsan, Aleksib, karrigan, and magixx reveal their ultimate dream teams with no limits in a new BLAST.tv video. The content highlights team-building strategies ahead of major tournaments like BLAST Austin Major 2025.

items.title: Ken Roczen Crashes While Passing Eli Tomac in Motocross Heat Race
items.summary: Ken Roczen made a bold pass attempt on Eli Tomac in a sand section during his heat race but tipped over, finishing fourth and impacting his gate pick. Tomac went on to win, underscoring the importance of strong starts in the event.

items.title: Metroid Prime Trilogy VR Mod with Motion Controls Showcased
items.summary: A new video demonstrates the full Metroid Prime Trilogy playable in VR with motion controls using the Dolphin VR emulator on devices like AYN Thor. Setup guides are provided for this immersive GameCube and Wii classic experience.

items.title: NBA 2K26 Player Achieves 50-Game Win Streaks in 1v1 Matches
items.summary: A 6'4 PG build in NBA 2K26 dominates Stage 1v1 courts, breaking win streaks against top players, TikTokers, post scorers, and rhythm shooters. The video features the best jumpshot, sigs, and animations for competitive play.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
